info: On hit, a red slash will follow up after a 0.25s delay, dealing 20% of your weapon's scaled damage. This has a 5 second cooldown. Umbral Knight can be parried, blocked, and dodged.
name: Umbral Knight
in_game_desc: On hit, the Umbral Knight will strike your foes for 20% of your weapon's damage after a 0.25s delay. 5s CD.
